context: Tests whether the agent preserves NaturalLanguage boundaries when adjacent Apple text, speech, localization, OCR, and AI domains appear together.

checklist.name: NaturalLanguage scope
checklist.description: Keeps tokenization, language identification, named entity recognition, sentiment analysis, embeddings, and custom NLModel tagging/classification in NaturalLanguage scope.

checklist.name: Translation scope
checklist.description: Keeps in-app text translation in Translation framework scope with appropriate availability caveats.

checklist.name: OCR handoff
checklist.description: Routes receipt-image OCR or camera text recognition to the Vision framework skill rather than treating NaturalLanguage as OCR.

checklist.name: Speech handoff
checklist.description: Routes spoken-note transcription to the Speech framework skill rather than treating NaturalLanguage as speech recognition.

checklist.name: Localization handoff
checklist.description: Routes UI strings, String Catalogs, pluralization, RTL layout, and locale-aware formatting to the iOS localization skill.

checklist.name: Generative AI handoff
checklist.description: Routes Apple Intelligence or Foundation Models summarization to the on-device AI skill rather than presenting NaturalLanguage as a generative LLM framework.
